billing.title: Billing
billing.description: Manage your billing and payment methods
billing.workspaceNote: This plan applies to all members of this workspace
billing.noSubscription: You don't have an active subscription
billing.freePlanNote: You are on the free plan. To access the billing portal, you need to subscribe to a paid plan.
billing.cancelConfirm: Are you sure you want to cancel your subscription? You will have access until the end of the current billing period.
billing.cancelSuccess: Subscription cancelled successfully. You will have access until the end of the billing period.
billing.cancelError: Could not cancel subscription. Please try again later.
billing.portalError: Could not access billing portal. Please try again later.
billing.activeSubscriptionNote: You have an active subscription. You can change to any paid plan from the Pricing page. To change to Free, first cancel your subscription.
billing.cancelPoint1: You will keep access until the end of the paid period
billing.cancelPoint2: No more automatic charges will be made
billing.cancelPoint3: You can reactivate your subscription at any time

usage.title: Usage & Billing
usage.description: Monitor your usage and manage your subscription
usage.atLimit: You have reached your plan limit
usage.upgradeDescription: Upgrade your plan to get more publications, storage and advanced features
usage.demoWarning: You are using the Demo plan. This plan is temporary and may be disabled at any time. Consider upgrading to a paid plan for continuous access.

addons.highUsageMessage: You're using a lot of your plan. Expand your capacity!
addons.trackUsageMessage: Keep control of your resources and expand when you need it
addons.title: Additional Packages
addons.subtitle: Extend your capacity with AI credits, storage, publications, and team members
addons.purchaseHistoryDescription: Your add-on purchases and their current status
addons.noPurchases: You haven't made any add-on purchases yet
addons.refundConfirm: Are you sure you want to request a refund?
addons.refundSuccessDescription: The refund has been processed successfully
addons.howItWorksPoint1: Add-ons are used automatically when you exceed your plan limit
addons.howItWorksPoint2: Your plan limit is used first, then add-ons
addons.howItWorksPoint3: Credits don't expire and accumulate if you buy multiple packages
addons.howItWorksPoint4: You can request a refund within 7 days if you haven't used the add-on
addons.noPackages: No packages available in this category

members_5.description: Add 5 more members to your team

members_10.description: Add 10 more members to your team

members_25.description: Add 25 more members to your team

subscription.limitReached: You have reached your plan limit

success.title: Payment Successful
success.heading: Payment Successful!
success.message: Your subscription has been activated successfully
success.detailsDescription: Information about your plan and payment
success.nextStepsDescription: Start taking advantage of all your plan features
success.step1: Access all your plan features from the dashboard
success.step3: Create and schedule your first post
success.step4: Review your invoice in the billing section

cancel.title: Payment Cancelled
cancel.heading: Payment Cancelled
cancel.message: No charge was made to your account
cancel.noChargeDescription: You have cancelled the payment process. No charge has been made to your card and your subscription has not been modified.
cancel.problemDescription: If you experienced any issues during the payment process or have questions about our plans, please don't hesitate to contact us.
cancel.option1: Return to the plans page and review available options
cancel.option2: Continue using your current plan without changes
cancel.option3: Contact support if you need help with the payment process
cancel.needHelp: Need help with the payment process?
